purpose: Record the focused Mobility & Positioning sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.spatialAutomation: Do not automate pathfinding, adjacency, threatened squares, line of sight, or token placement in this pass. Store metadata until a movement/AoO workflow supplies reliable spatial context.
policy.alreadyCovered: Charge, Bantha Rush, Improved Bantha Rush, Running Attack, Charging Fire, Powerful Charge, Improved Charge, and Deft Charge are already normalized by core attack-option hooks.
policy.invalidEntries: Do not implement Wounding Strike, Spring Attack, Reckless Charge, or Heroic Surge as feats. They were rejected by the strict Combat validity audit.

implementedEntries.name: Bantha Herder
implementedEntries.mechanic: On a damaging ranged hit, compare the attack roll to Will Defense; if successful, advisory metadata allows moving the target 1 square in any direction.

implementedEntries.name: Fleet-Footed
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records a +2-square movement speed bonus for sheet or movement-aware workflows.

implementedEntries.name: Tactical Advantage
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records positioning-dependent tactical metadata; no automatic modifier until workflow supplies exact battlefield context.

implementedEntries.name: Opportunistic Retreat
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records retreat/repositioning opportunity metadata without choosing a destination or validating threatened squares.

implementedEntries.name: Impulsive Flight
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records flight/repositioning opportunity metadata without automating path or destination.

implementedEntries.name: Steadying Position
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records stable/stationary positioning state metadata for later attack workflows.

implementedEntries.name: Cornered
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records cornered/no-escape conditional state metadata. Exact bonus application waits for a workflow-provided cornered context.

excludedEntries.name: Wounding Strike
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Spring Attack
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Reckless Charge
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Heroic Surge
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
